description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build, formatting, and build-docs. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.6, installs dependencies, tests with pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov on ubuntu-latest. The formatting job checks the code format on ubuntu-latest by running a pre-commit script. The build-docs job builds the documentation on ubuntu-latest by setting up Python 3.6, installing dependencies, and running mkdocs build.
